title: Pema Chödrön
blurb: Beloved teacher on working with difficulty and fear.
lead: An American Tibetan Buddhist nun known for compassionate teachings on staying present with pain and uncertainty.

blocks.text: Pema Chödrön is an ordained Buddhist nun in the Tibetan tradition and a widely loved author and teacher.
She teaches how to work skilfully with fear, groundlessness, and difficult emotions — including the practice of tonglen.
Her free articles and talks on tonglen and 'staying with' difficulty offer comfort and practical wisdom in hard times.

resources.title: How to practice Tonglen
resources.whyHere: Free guidance on her signature compassion practice.
